content.problemStatement:
For an array BBB of length MMM, suppose F(B)=∑i=1M−1(−1)i+1∣Bi−Bi+1∣7F(B) = \sum_{i=1}^{M-1} (-1)^{i+1} {|B_i - B_{i+1}|}^7F(B)=∑i=1M−1​(−1)i+1∣Bi​−Bi+1​∣7.

You are given an array AAA of length NNN.

Find the **sum** of F(S)F(S)F(S) over all non-empty subsequences SSS of AAA. Since the sum might be too large, please print it modulo 998244353998244353998244353.


Input Format

The first line of input contains a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of two lines of input.

The first line of each test case contains a single integer NNN — the length of the array AAA.
The second line of each test case contains NNN space-separated integers A1,A2,…,ANA_1,A_2,\ldots,A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​ representing the array AAA.




Output Format
For each test case, output the required sum modulo 998244353998244353998244353.
constraints: The sum of NNN over all test cases won't exceed 5⋅1055 \cdot 10^55⋅105.
